Text: When I open the Financial Summary graph, by default the current year must be selected in the year dropdown if data exists for the current year, otherwise the most recent year with data must be selected.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I open the Financial Summary graph, by default the current year must be selected in the year dropdown if data exists for the current year, otherwise the most recent year with data must be selected.

Text: When I click the year dropdown, all years that have invoice data must be shown (e.g., if invoices exist from 2022–2025, the dropdown must show 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025).
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I click the year dropdown, all years that have invoice data must be shown (e.g., if invoices exist from 2022–2025, the dropdown must show 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025).

Text: When I create an invoice for an appointment on **Dec 20, 2024** with invoice creation date **Dec 20, 2024** and do not pay it, the full amount must be shown in the **Unpaid** bar of 2024.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I create an invoice for an appointment on **Dec 20, 2024** with invoice creation date **Dec 20, 2024** and do not pay it, the full amount must be shown in the **Unpaid** bar of 2024.

Text: When I pay that same invoice in **Jan 2025**, the **Paid** bar of 2024 must increase by that amount, and the **Unpaid** bar of 2024 must decrease accordingly, because the invoice creation date belongs to 2024.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I pay that same invoice in **Jan 2025**, the **Paid** bar of 2024 must increase by that amount, and the **Unpaid** bar of 2024 must decrease accordingly, because the invoice creation date belongs to 2024.

Text: When I create an invoice on **Dec 31, 2024** with amount $200 and move it to **Bad Debt** in **Feb 2025**, the $200 must still be shown in the **Bad Debt** bar of 2024, not 2025, because the invoice creation date is Dec 2024.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I create an invoice on **Dec 31, 2024** with amount $200 and move it to **Bad Debt** in **Feb 2025**, the $200 must still be shown in the **Bad Debt** bar of 2024, not 2025, because the invoice creation date is Dec 2024.

Text: When I create an invoice on **Jan 15, 2025** with amount $300 and leave it unpaid, the $300 must be reflected in the **Unpaid** bar of 2025.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I create an invoice on **Jan 15, 2025** with amount $300 and leave it unpaid, the $300 must be reflected in the **Unpaid** bar of 2025.

Text: When I later pay that **Jan 15, 2025** invoice in **March 2025**, the $300 must move from the **Unpaid** bar of 2025 into the **Paid** bar of 2025.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I later pay that **Jan 15, 2025** invoice in **March 2025**, the $300 must move from the **Unpaid** bar of 2025 into the **Paid** bar of 2025.

Text: When I create an invoice on **Nov 2023** with $500 and never pay it, the $500 must remain in the **Unpaid** bar of 2023 even when I view the graph in later years.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I create an invoice on **Nov 2023** with $500 and never pay it, the $500 must remain in the **Unpaid** bar of 2023 even when I view the graph in later years.

Text: When I move that same **Nov 2023** invoice of $500 to **Bad Debt** in **2024**, the $500 must be removed from the **Unpaid** bar of 2023 and added to the **Bad Debt** bar of 2023.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I move that same **Nov 2023** invoice of $500 to **Bad Debt** in **2024**, the $500 must be removed from the **Unpaid** bar of 2023 and added to the **Bad Debt** bar of 2023.

Text: When I move a Bad Debt invoice back to Billing in the same year, its amount must be moved out of the **Bad Debt** bar and placed back into **Unpaid** (or **Paid** if it was already paid).
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I move a Bad Debt invoice back to Billing in the same year, its amount must be moved out of the **Bad Debt** bar and placed back into **Unpaid** (or **Paid** if it was already paid).

Text: When I view the bar graph for **2025**, only invoices with **creation dates in 2025** must contribute to Paid, Unpaid, and Bad Debt amounts.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I view the bar graph for **2025**, only invoices with **creation dates in 2025** must contribute to Paid, Unpaid, and Bad Debt amounts.

Text: When I sum the amounts across **Paid + Unpaid + Bad Debt bars** for any given year, the total must equal the total invoice amount created in that year.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I sum the amounts across **Paid + Unpaid + Bad Debt bars** for any given year, the total must equal the total invoice amount created in that year.

Text: When no invoices exist for a particular year, the year must not be shown in the dropdown, and no bars must be displayed for that year.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When no invoices exist for a particular year, the year must not be shown in the dropdown, and no bars must be displayed for that year.

Text: When I hover over the Paid, Unpaid, or Bad Debt bar for any month, then a tooltip must be displayed showing the respective amount for that category.
Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Financial Summary Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I hover over the Paid, Unpaid, or Bad Debt bar for any month, then a tooltip must be displayed showing the respective amount for that category.

Hierarchy Path: CodeGen/TestSuite:: for p/Client/Kinergy/Kinergy > ### TestType/Web > Admin Portal > Dashboard > Dashboard Analytics > Revenue Source Analytics Graph > Screen 1: > Test cases > When I apply the Today filter on October 1, that appointment must not be included because the receipt was created in September.
